data.general: With the Sun, Moon, and Mars in the 8th house, you're going through a period of intense transformation and regeneration. This transit is affecting your personal relationships and emotional well-being. You may feel a sense of restlessness and a need for change in these areas of your life.
data.luck: Your luck is influenced by the presence of Jupiter and Venus in the 10th house, indicating growth and expansion in your career and public image. However, Saturn in the 7th house may bring some challenges and obstacles in your personal relationships. You need to be patient and work through these issues.
data.scope: Your focus and ambition are likely to be directed towards your career and public image, with Jupiter and Venus in the 10th house. You may receive opportunities for growth and recognition in this area. However, you need to balance your personal and professional life, as Saturn in the 7th house may bring some tension.
data.study: With Mercury in the 9th house, you're in a good period for learning and personal growth. You may feel a desire to explore new ideas and expand your knowledge in various subjects. This is an excellent time to pursue higher education or take online courses.
data.love: Your love life is influenced by the presence of Venus in the 10th house, indicating a need for balance and harmony in your relationships. You may feel a sense of detachment or distance from your partner, which can be challenging to navigate. However, with Jupiter in the 10th house, you may also experience a deepening of your emotional connection with your partner.
data.travel: With Rahu in the 6th house, you may feel a sense of restlessness and a need for change in your daily routine. You may feel an urge to travel or explore new places, which can be a great opportunity for personal growth and self-discovery. However, you need to be mindful of your health and well-being during this time.
